sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n80586" key="penqe/thros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πενθέτηρ-ος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n80586.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">in the fifth year</tr_> (inclusively), <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τροπαί</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0205.tlg001:131" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Philod.Scarph.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">131</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
